titles.title: He Never Once Stopped Loving Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’ve lived my life, full of sin and sadness Just as sinful as any sinner could ever be But through it all He stood by waiting, for me And He never once stopped loving me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As He hang there on the rugged cross at Calvary Ten thousand Angels would have come and set Him free Oh but He chose to bleed and die for my salvation And He never once stopped loving me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Many years ago I heard my Saviour calling But my foolish heart refused His tender plea The dearest Friend I’ve ever known never gave up on me And He never once stopped loving me
